category_sources: Official GitHub repository About text describes it as a terminal based graphical activity monitor inspired by gtop and vtop.
source_facts.description says this is a terminal based graphical activity monitor.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is xxxserxxx/gotop.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/xxxserxxx/gotop; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository About text confirms the graphical activity monitor purpose.
